title: Fantasia 2014
body: Party Colin threw/curated. The Westword *Cave Rave* preview and *Fantasia 2014* piece cover the event. Colin's Cargo Collective portfolio has an entire F2014-* poster series (F2014-THA-ART-, F2014-SPIDER-DREAM, AIR SHAMAN, AIRPORT, CASH CONTROL, CLUB GLOBE, RAPTOR JAZZ, HOW2GET-WHAT-U-WANT4).
